sector_specific_levers.lever_name: OTA Commission Reduction (Direct Booking Channel Mix Shift)
condition_precedents: OTA channel mix analysed — commission rate by OTA and booking type quantified
Direct booking capability enhanced (website UX, loyalty programme, rate parity enforcement)
Revenue management strategy updated: direct-channel rate advantage validated
industry_sources: Ministry of Tourism India — India Tourism Statistics 2024 (tourism.gov.in/india-tourism-statistics) — OTA distribution channel mix benchmarks
FHRAI — Hotel Industry Survey 2024 (fhrai.com/) — OTA commission rates and direct booking benchmarks India 12-25%
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Food & Beverage Procurement Optimisation (Menu Engineering & Waste Reduction)
condition_precedents: Menu engineering analysis completed (contribution margin by item; star/plow/dog/puzzle matrix)
Food cost percentage benchmarked vs. peer set (target < 28-32% of F&B revenue)
Supplier consolidation for top 10 ingredients/categories completed
industry_sources: FHRAI — Hotel Industry Survey 2024 (fhrai.com/) — F&B cost as % of revenue benchmarks India
Ministry of Tourism — India Tourism Statistics 2024 (tourism.gov.in/india-tourism-statistics) — hospitality sector cost structure data
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Energy Cost per Key Reduction (Smart Room Energy Management & HVAC Optimisation)
condition_precedents: Energy consumption per key benchmarked (kWh/occupied room night vs. comparable hotels)
Smart room energy management system (HVAC occupancy sensors, keycard-linked control) evaluated
Utility contract renegotiated — renewable energy tariff or fixed-rate contract secured
industry_sources: Ministry of Tourism — Green Hotel Guidelines (tourism.gov.in) — energy efficiency standards for Indian hotels
BEE — Hotel Energy Efficiency Programme (beeindia.gov.in) — energy intensity benchmarks for hospitality sector
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

condition_precedents: Occupancy-based scheduling model implemented (labour hours per occupied room benchmarked)
Guest opt-out programme for daily room cleaning rolled out (reduced departure cleans)
Housekeeping chemical and linen supplier consolidation completed with volume pricing
industry_sources: FHRAI — Hotel Industry Survey 2024 (fhrai.com/) — housekeeping cost per occupied room benchmarks India
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

condition_precedents: Revenue management system (IDeaS, Duetto, or Opera RMS) deployed and configured
Competitive rate intelligence tool integrated (OTA Insight or equivalent)
Revenue manager trained and empowered to override pricing decisions with RMS-backed logic
industry_sources: STR — India Hotel Benchmark 2024 (str.com/solutions/benchmarking) — RevPAR, ADR, occupancy benchmarks by hotel category and city
Ministry of Tourism — India Tourism Statistics 2024 (tourism.gov.in/india-tourism-statistics) — hotel performance data India
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

source_verification_note: industry_sources entries indicate the published works that directionally support each lever's savings thesis. Where no external benchmark was found, INTERNAL_CALIBRATION is noted. All cited sources are real publications; specific savings percentages remain internal calibrations unless the source directly cites a matching range.
